title: Walk In Truth

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: Test my heart, look deep inside
Nothing to hide, in Your light
I reside My feet planted firm on holy ground
In Your truth, my peace is found
I will walk in integrity
Your love surrounds and sets me free
Wash me clean as morning rain
Your altar's where I'll remain
(Your altar's where I'll remain)
Far from those who speak in lies
Their hands hold schemes, their words divide
But I choose to dance in grace
Among the faithful, I'll find my place
My voice rises with the dawn
Telling stories of what You've done
In the assembly, I'll proclaim
The wonders of Your name
I will walk in integrity
Your love surrounds and sets me free
Wash me clean as morning rain
Your altar's where I'll remain
(Your altar's where I'll remain)
[Final Verse] Standing firm on level ground
In Your courts, I'm glory-bound
My soul redeemed, my path made clear
Forever I'll worship here
I will walk in integrity
Your love surrounds and sets me free
Wash me clean as morning rain
Your altar's where I'll remain

epigraph: and I have walked in thy truth
